nasb.text: Then the Lord spoke to Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, in the tent of meeting, on the first of the second month, in the second year after they had come out of the land of Egypt, saying,

esv.text: The Lord spoke to Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, in the tent of meeting, on the first day of the second month, in the second year after they had come out of the land of Egypt, saying,

cnv.text: 以色列人出埃及地以後，第二年二月一日，耶和華在西奈的曠野，在會幕裡對摩西說：

ccb.text: 以色列人离开埃及后第二年的二月一日，耶和华在西奈旷野的会幕中对摩西说：
